plugin.name: Wbcom CAPTCHA Manager
plugin.namespace: global (WBC_* / Recaptcha_For_BuddyPress* class prefixes â€” no PSR-4 namespace)
plugin.description: Multi-provider CAPTCHA for WordPress (login/register/lost-password), WooCommerce (checkout/account/reviews), BuddyPress (signup/groups), bbPress (topic/reply), comments, and 10+ form builders.

endpoints.purpose: Issues an ALTCHA proof-of-work challenge. Public â€” required for the client-side widget to fetch a challenge before submission.

ajax.purpose: AJAX login widget â€” accepts user/pass, verifies the active CAPTCHA service, calls wp_signon. Returns JSON with display_name + redirect_to (no email after 2.1.0).
Shared Wbcom admin â€” fetches the addon-cards markup for the WB Plugins menu.

admin_pages.title: ALTCHA Options
admin_pages.library: vendored ALTCHA library â€” separate page from main plugin settings

settings.purpose: Active provider id (recaptcha-v2 / recaptcha-v3 / hcaptcha / turnstile / altcha)
Per-provider API credentials (with hyphen-form fallback for backward compat)
Widget theme (shared across reCAPTCHA v2 + hCaptcha)
Widget size (shared across reCAPTCHA v2 + hCaptcha)
IP whitelist â€” exact, dash-range (1.2.3.4-1.2.3.10), or CIDR (10.0.0.0/24) since 2.1.0
Block forms when active service is unconfigured (instead of fail-open). Filter: wbc_captcha_fail_closed.
Require per-context nonce on plugin-controlled forms. Filter: wbc_captcha_strict_nonce. Wired in hCaptcha + reCAPTCHA v2 + Turnstile verify().
Per-context disable-submit-until-verified toggle (works for reCAPTCHA v2; hCaptcha now wired in 2.1.0)
Dequeue other plugins' reCAPTCHA scripts to prevent conflicts

shortcodes.purpose: Shared Wbcom admin header (used inside admin pages, not for end users)

blocks.name: buddypress-recaptcha/login
blocks.purpose: Gutenberg login widget â€” renders the AJAX login form with active CAPTCHA

capabilities.use: All admin pages + settings save handlers. Plugin defines NO custom capabilities.

services.purpose: Registry + dispatcher for all 5 CAPTCHA services. Resolves active service from wbc_captcha_service option.
Base class â€” owns contextâ†’nonce, contextâ†’form selector, contextâ†’submit selector, contextâ†’enable-option maps. Provides no-conflict, IP-restriction, render/verify guards.
Interface for custom 3rd-party services registered via wbc_register_captcha_services action.
Migrates old hyphen-format options to underscore format (e.g. wbc_recaptcha-v2_site_key â†’ wbc_recaptcha_v2_site_key).

hooks_fired.name: wbc_register_captcha_services
hooks_fired.purpose: Allow 3rd-party plugins to register custom CAPTCHA service implementations.

hooks_fired.name: wbc_recaptcha_register_settings_modules
hooks_fired.purpose: Allow extensions to register additional settings modules.

hooks_fired.name: wbc_recaptcha_settings_saved
hooks_fired.purpose: Fires after the BP/Woo settings page saves â€” extensions can react to settings updates.

hooks_fired.name: wbc_should_render_captcha
hooks_fired.purpose: Last-mile filter to skip captcha rendering for a specific context/request.

hooks_fired.name: wbc_should_verify_captcha
hooks_fired.purpose: Last-mile filter to skip captcha verification.

hooks_fired.name: wbc_captcha_verified
hooks_fired.purpose: Override verification result post-API-call (e.g., flag low-score reCAPTCHA v3 responses as failed).

hooks_fired.name: wbc_captcha_fail_closed
hooks_fired.purpose: Override the wbc_captcha_fail_closed option per-request â€” when true, missing config or verify exceptions block instead of fail-open.

hooks_fired.name: wbc_captcha_strict_nonce
hooks_fired.purpose: Override the wbc_captcha_strict_nonce option per-request â€” when true, the per-context nonce is required.

hooks_fired.name: wbc_recaptcha_v3_verify
hooks_fired.purpose: v3-specific verification filter (operates on the score-bearing API result).

hooks_fired.name: wbc_recaptcha_*_settings (10 filters)
hooks_fired.purpose: Settings-page extension points for sub-tabs / fields.

hooks_fired.name: wbcom_add_header_menu / wbcom_add_plugin_license_code
hooks_fired.purpose: Shared Wbcom admin extension points â€” addon catalog, license code injection.

hooks_fired.name: altcha_*
hooks_fired.purpose: Vendored ALTCHA library hooks â€” internal to the ALTCHA service, not part of the plugin's public API.

hooks_fired.name: anr_recaptcha_domain
hooks_fired.purpose: Override Google reCAPTCHA hostname (e.g., google.com â†’ recaptcha.net for users behind GFW).

hooks_fired.name: bp_accept_tos_errors
hooks_fired.purpose: BuddyPress signup ToS-acceptance hook used during BP register CAPTCHA validation.

rest_hang_risks.note: AJAX login uses jQuery $.ajax without explicit timeout â€” failed networks leave the form spinner indefinitely. Low risk for short login round-trip but worth a 30s timeout in a future refactor.

rest_js_contract.reason: no register_rest_route calls (the 1 ALTCHA route has no JS contract)

buddypress_integration.manager: WBC_Captcha_Service_Manager (per-context render via bp_register / bp_signup_validate filters)

nonce_pairs.purpose: Per-context CSRF protection â€” advisory by default, mandatory under wbc_captcha_strict_nonce.

coding_rules: All option keys prefixed wbc_ (or legacy wbc_recapcha_ for original-typo back-compat).
Settings page is WooCommerce-style (uses woocommerce_admin_field_*, woocommerce_settings_* hooks even when WC is absent).
Per-context behavior dispatched via context-string maps (nonce/selector/option), not OOP polymorphism â€” see WBC_Captcha_Service_Base.
EDD SL SDK is keyless (no license check) â€” plugin updates from wbcomdesigns.com EDD store.
ALTCHA is a vendored library at includes/lib/altcha/ â€” modifying its files is a deliberate fork (e.g., 2.1.0 REMOTE_ADDR-only fix).

build_commands.release: npm run build (= grunt build) â†’ dist/buddypress-recaptcha-<version>.zip
build_commands.package_version_source: package.json (consumed by Gruntfile copy:dist as <%= pkg.version %>)

generated.notes: Plugin uses no PSR-4 namespace; class names start with WBC_* or Recaptcha_For_BuddyPress*. ALTCHA library at includes/lib/altcha is vendored and treated as plugin-owned (we fork-edit it for security fixes). REST has only the ALTCHA challenge endpoint; the rest of the plugin uses wp-admin/admin-ajax.php + WP/WC/BP form-validation hooks.
